dry_run_result.result_summary: Synthetic local-only description of what a future Worker result might contain. No task was executed and no result was produced by any real Worker.

events.event_notes: Synthetic local-only placeholder event describing that a dry-run preview shape exists. No real Worker, OpenClaw, or Hermes actor performed this event.
Synthetic local-only placeholder event describing that a dry-run result shape exists. No task was executed to produce this event.

owner_review_event.review_notice: This is a synthetic local-only preview only. Owner Review is required before any future round may change any permission or runtime-state flag away from false.

readback_summary.operator_summary: Synthetic local-only readback summary. Describes the shape of a future dry-run result and audit trail without implying any real Worker execution occurred.
readback_summary.safety_summary: No Worker, OpenClaw, Hermes, Google Sheets, or real queue involvement. All permission and runtime-state flags are false.
readback_summary.next_step_hint: A future round may plan read-only Dashboard display of this synthetic model; it must not start a real Worker or add any execution/dispatch control.

boundary_summary: Synthetic local-only Worker dry-run result / audit trail / owner review event / readback summary preview. No Worker, Worker loop, OpenClaw, Hermes, Google Sheets, real queue DB, POST, execution, dispatch, secrets, webhook, endpoint, connector, or production/shared DB is used. All permission and runtime-state flags are false.
